category_sources: source_facts.description says AI agent toolkit; official docs at https://pi.dev/docs/latest describe Pi as a terminal coding harness.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pi-coding-agent; official docs install package @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent and call the product Pi.
docs_sources: Official Pi documentation under pi.dev/docs/latest provides overview, quickstart, and SDK pages.
repo_sources: Official Pi development documentation at https://pi.dev/docs/latest/development gives git clone https://github.com/earendil-works/pi-mono and shows packages/coding-agent as the CLI package.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says AI agent toolkit; official Pi docs describe terminal coding harness, CLI use, extensions, and SDK.
